recommendations.title: Robin Robin
recommendations.overview: A bird raised by mice begins to question where she belongs and sets off on a daring journey of self-discovery.

recommendations.title: Brother Bear 2
recommendations.overview: Kenai finds his childhood human friend Nita and the two embark on a journey to burn the amulet he gave to her before he was a bear, much to Koda's dismay.

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace
recommendations.overview: Master Yoda must go retrieve secret battle plans. However, things become a little more complicated when a class of younglings join the mission.

recommendations.title: The Polar Express
recommendations.overview: When a doubting young boy takes an extraordinary train ride to the North Pole, he embarks on a journey of self-discovery that shows him that the wonder of life never fades for those who believe.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Puss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale
recommendations.overview: After tumbling into a magic storybook, Puss in Boots must fight, dance and romance his way through wild adventures as he searches for an escape.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time III: The Time of the Great Giving
recommendations.overview: When a sudden shortage of water threatens all life in the great valley, The gang of young dinosaur must cooperate with a group of bullies to make a risky journey outside the valley and find the cause.

recommendations.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
recommendations.overview: An epic journey of a young hero and her Spirit Guides, 'Dillo' a cute and humorous armadillo and "Vaca" a goofy oversized tapir, who embark on a quest to save their home in the spectacular Amazon Rainforest.

recommendations.title: The Land Before Time XIV: Journey of the Brave
recommendations.overview: On a day known to the dinosaurs as "Treasure Day", Bron becomes stuck in the Mysterious Beyond. This event urges the young Longneck Littlefoot to take his friends on a quest to the Fire Mountain to save his father. Along the way, they befriend a Flye

recommendations.title: Mummies
recommendations.overview: Through a series of unfortunate events, three mummies end up in present-day London and embark on a wacky and hilarious journey in search of an old ring belonging to the Royal Family, stolen by ambitious archaeologist Lord Carnaby.
